steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage tells us that a negative effect value means a harmful effect, so we need to look for neighboring species with negative values in the table.

steps.title: Match the signal to the choices
steps.content: Leafy spurge and prickly pear both show negative effect values in the table, indicating they are harmful. The other choices either pair a harmful species with a neutral/beneficial one or include species with non‑negative values. That matches Choice B — leafy spurge and the prickly pear..
